series_metadata.series_title: Unsuccessful Bids and Submissions by Vendors
series_metadata.series_description: Quotes and proposed pricing for goods and/or services by soliciting vendors for competitive bids and other purchase needs made by the Ohio Attorney General''s Office (AGO), but are ultimately not awarded a contract. Records include, but are not limited to, request for quotes/qualifications/proposals, technical specifications developed from IT, internal process documents used by IT, legal advice from Business Counsel, questions and answers, evaluations/scoring sheets, and bidding challenges. Winning bids will be retained with the contract file and some bidding documents may be retained with ITS project files for development purposes.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from contract awarding. ; Paper: from contract awarding, unless scanned and saved electronically
